title: NNSA News
description: Press release articles related to the National Nuclear Security Administration
text:

Request for Proposal calls for a system to be deployed at Oak Ridge National Laboratory and Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory.
Administrator Gordon-Hagerty is responsible for the management and operation of NNSA.
Lisa E. Gordon-Hagerty was confirmed by the Senate as the Department of Energy’s Under Secretary for Nuclear Security and Administrator for NNSA.
Efforts ensure a reliable supply of a vital medical isotope used in diagnostic imaging.
NNSA today published the “2017 Year in Review.” The report highlights major accomplishments from the past year across vital national security missions
